camera.note: Requires camera and microphone usage descriptions when those features are used.

image_picker.note: Supported on iOS; photo or camera access may require usage descriptions.

geolocator.note: Supported on iOS; location features require usage descriptions.

permission_handler.note: Supported on iOS; enable only the permissions used by the app.

firebase_core.note: Compatible with iOS when Firebase is configured correctly.

firebase_messaging.note: Supported on iOS; push notification setup is required. iOS does not use an Info.plist usage-description key for notification authorization.

flutter_local_notifications.note: Supported on iOS; notification authorization may be required.
